chapter_title.ar: باب الْمَرْأَةِ تَرَى الصُّفْرَةَ قَبْلَ الْحَيْضِ أَوْ بَعْدَهُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 4 – The woman sees the yellowness before the menstruation (Haydh), or after it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/209)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/209)
text: إِذَا رَأَتِ الْمَرْأَةُ الصُّفْرَةَ قَبْلَ انْقِضَاءِ أَيَّامِ عِدَّتِهَا لَمْ تُصَلِّ وَ إِنْ كَانَتْ صُفْرَةٌ بَعْدَ انْقِضَاءِ أَيَّامِ قُرْئِهَا صَلَّتْ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Al Washa, from Aban, from Ismail Al Ju’fy,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘When the woman sees the yellowness before the passing of her numbered days, she should not pray Salaat; and if the yellowness was after the passing of her days of purity, she should pray Salaat’.
en.sarwar: 3. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla’ ibn Muhammad from al-Washsha’ from Aban from ’Isma‘il al-Ju‘fiy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If a woman experiences a discharge of yellowish color within the (normal) time period of her Hayd (menses), she must not perform Salah (prayer); but if it is after the period of Hayd-free time she must perform Salah (prayer).”’
